---
title: "Subject 2 - Econometrics 2 - Applied Project: Labor Market and Origin"
author: "Polixène, Juliette, Rachel"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-27"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
#install.packages()
library(haven)
```

```{r data, include=FALSE}
url <- "https://github.com/pgresant/econo2_project/raw/main/DM_Subject_2_Data.dta"
data <- read_dta(url)
```


# 1. Intensive Margin (Net Hourly Wage)

```{r}

```


# 2. Extensive Margin (Employed vs. Unemployed)

```{r}

```

```{r}

```


partie de base à garder pr avoir une idée de comment faire ce type de truc  
## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
